title: SSE run stream + run viewer UI

implement.detail: server: in-memory run bus (buffer+replay+listener cleanup+50-run prune), async POST /run (202 {runId}; ?sync=1 for tests), GET /api/runs/:id/stream SSE. dist/index.html run viewer (vanilla, Garrison palette): automations list, live step list w/ status+tier+duration, type panels (terminal for local_command via step_output_chunk, JSON for api_call/connector/verify), live-browser-stream placeholder, awaiting_connector/self-heal notices, per-step feedback. XSS-safe (textContent).

test.detail: automations-sse.test (1, live server): async run -> SSE run_step + step_output_chunk(streamed output) + run_complete, both steps completed. validate 4/4; typecheck clean; engine/store regress green (17 total).

review.detail: self-caught + fixed: unbounded run bus (prune) and an innerHTML XSS vector (-> textContent)

codexReview.detail: engine logic + secret handling reviewed in E2 (approve); E3 adds only SSE plumbing + a static viewer with no new secret-handling (events are already engine-redacted). Self-reviewed for memory leak + XSS.

designAudit.detail: matches the wireframe §08 palette/layout; recorded + audited in the Z1 e2e walkthrough

walkthrough.detail: run viewer recorded in Z1 e2e
